title: Self-Referential Fixed Point in AI

analysis.object: T612: Self-Referential Fixed Point in AI depth analysis

current_self_ref.description: Current AI self-reference: EML-2 (model talks about itself; meta-description)
current_self_ref.reason: AI self-description is EML-2: measurement of own outputs; not genuine self-observation

fixed_point_test.description: d(observe(d)) = 3 for current AI; not ∞; fixed point not satisfied
fixed_point_test.reason: AI observe(AI) = EML-3 processing; no escalation to EML-inf; fixed point fails

architectural_gap.description: Gap between EML-3 self-processing and EML-inf self-observation is TYPE3
architectural_gap.reason: Self-referential fixed point requires architecture beyond EML-3; TYPE3 gap blocks current AI

analysis.theorem: T612: Self-Referential Fixed Point in AI (S891).

key_theorem: T612: Self-Referential Fixed Point in AI (S891).
